name: @nexus-ai/nexus-cli
description: Multi-model AI CLI tool for humans and agents

scripts.build: bun run --filter=@nexus-ai/core build && bun run --filter=@nexus-ai/headless build && bun run --filter=@nexus-ai/agent build && bun run --filter=@nexus-ai/tools build && bun run --filter=@nexus-ai/plugins build && bun run --filter=@nexus-ai/tui build && bun run --filter=@nexus-ai/cli build
scripts.compile: bun run build && bun build --compile packages/cli/src/index.ts --outfile dist/nexus
scripts.compile:darwin-arm64: bun run build && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 packages/cli/src/index.ts --outfile dist/nexus-darwin-arm64
scripts.compile:darwin-x64: bun run build && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 packages/cli/src/index.ts --outfile dist/nexus-darwin-x64
scripts.compile:linux-x64: bun run build && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 packages/cli/src/index.ts --outfile dist/nexus-linux-x64

author: Nexus Team
